allow: PowerShell($lines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines\('step2_output.csv', [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $hdr = $lines[0]; "Header: $hdr"; $data = $lines | Select-Object -Skip 1; "Total rows: $\($data.Count\)"; $genderCounts = $data | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split ','\)[2] } | Group-Object | Select-Object Name,Count; "Gender values:"; $genderCounts | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; $tCounts = $data | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split ','\)[5] } | Group-Object | Select-Object Name,Count; "T values:"; $tCounts | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; $yCounts = $data | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split ','\)[6] } | Group-Object | Select-Object Name,Count; "Y values:"; $yCounts | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)
